title: Shadow Hotbar (borderless n lava)
body:
This texture pack transforms the Hotbar, changing the background to rounded shadows for depth and the outline to a lava color. The interface becomes vibrant and stylish.

compatibility from 1.20x to 1.21x

![How it looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/312935132a85290cddcbd3120feaa7fe553e4f02.png)
